...Every person in America killed by illegals and Democrats, didn't even get a fraction of that kind of support from their government. What a fucking high horse it is to be able to cry woe is me after getting rich while being part of the political machine that buried the voices of dead Americans under the bootheel of media and politics for decades, while amplifying the voices of communism, socialists, murderers, and enemy nations. So excuse me while I don't shed a single tear.

And you know what the irony is? It's probably a Mexican or S. American gang that did this to her. She and others like her literally fermented this kind of third world shit. They thought that the consequences of their actions were for the poors, until it finally came home to roost at their door.
